title: [Archived] New Vanilla Items (NVI)
description: A mod that will improve your survival. This mod adds new structure, new blocks, ores, music discs from Terraria, new weapons and obsidian with emerald armor.
body:
# The mod has been archived and will not receive any further updates.
Thanks for your attention.

# Tools / Weapons
### Scythes
The new weapon - **scythes**. Deals one more damage than a sword, but has a slower attack speed and a new effect: "Bleeding". When this effect is applied, the creature takes damage every second of that effect. Each scythe has a different amount of time for which it gives this effect. Also, with the "Vampire" effect, you can increase the amount of time the scythe will deal damage to the creature you hit. If you are fighting a person with a scythe or a Bleed enchantment, you should drink the "Bleed Protection" potion. This effect will help you avoid bleeding.

To craft the "Vampire" potion, you need a mundane potion and a glistering watermelon slice.

You need awkward potion and glowstone dust to craft the "Bleed Protection" potion.

To craft a scythe, you need two sticks and three units of the material you want your scythe to be made of. 

Also, you can craft an improved version of the scythe that imposes the "Bleeding" effect for a longer period of time. Simply combine redstone and scythe in the blacksmith's table. Improved scythes can be repaired with redstone.
Also, scythes and their improved versions are not available in all materials, for balance.

![Example of the difference between an improved scythe and a normal scythe](https://i.postimg.cc/mgNkvPCz/Base-Profile-2024-08-11-22-38-37-022.gif)

See JEI/EMI/REI for all recipes.
### Daggers
Daggers deals two less damage than swords, but have a higher attack speed. The Golden Dagger has the highest speed: 2.4, but sacrifices its durability. The most optimal dagger is, of course, the netherite. It deals damage like the iron sword, but with a higher attack speed.

To craft a dagger you don't need a workbench, just a stick with one unit of material, which is what your dagger will be made of.

![Example of dagger strikes](https://i.postimg.cc/0yf7qkwQ/Base-Profile.gif)
### Hammers
This is **the most serious weapon** in New Vanilla Items.

The hammer has 4 more damage than the sword, but the lowest attack speed: just 0.7. But a netherite hammer enchanted for sharpness two will leave a zombie, skeleton, and other creatures with 20 HP (10 hearts) with nothing more than half a heart.
**Anyway, I think you'll find it's a killer weapon.**

![Example of hammer blows with two hammers: enchanted for sharpness and enchanted for bleeding](https://i.postimg.cc/MKHSYvKb/Base-Profile-2024-08-11-23-03-15-04.gif)

### Obsidian set
The obsidian set is an iron set with the highest durability. Except for the pickaxe - the durability is the same, but it will be able to mine obsidian.

### Emerald set
Maybe it's unbalanced, but the emerald set is something between diamond and netherite. Live with it.
# Food
### Simple food
Emerald Carrots - carrots and 8 nuggets of emerald.
Emerald Potatoes - potatoes and 8 emerald nuggets.
Gold Potato - a potato and 8 nuggets of gold.

![Simple food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e97b30d72d7df69ef5466cfccaf1534370673456.png)
### Unusual food
Fried bread. Prepared by smoking bread.

![Fried bread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1346f0ae49ae4fe972599068fbc250239dacb66.png)

Jam. You can drink it even if you are not hungry. It is crafted from two of any berries and a bottle.

![Berry jam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dddd335e32e7f1f260bb0b94e26b7fff66dfc44a.png)

Caramel. Prepared by melting sugar in an furnace. When you combine caramel with a bottle, you will create a bottle of caramel that can be mixed in the workbench with an apple to create a caramelized apple.

![Caramel products](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9902b012798ff87f79eb5f7381e03d3502a60281.png)

Rotten flesh is now useful: mix seven rotten flesh with two units of sugar, producing normal flesh. Afterwards, roast it in the furnace for fried flesh.

![Useful flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d627383aef0828312d9af9c94949319f3f932010.png)

# Other
### Trimming the armor with rubies
Rubies are the rarest crystals in NVI. Rubies are created for beauty as well as FireSafety mod crafts. Rubies can be found at the very bottom, the lower you go, the more rubies you will find. There are no rubies in stone, only in deepslate.

![Armor trimmed with rubies](https://i.postimg.cc/7LtH4066/2024-08-11-23-36-11.png)
![Ruby Ore](https://i.postimg.cc/90rqVcC3/2024-08-12-00-03-25.png)
### Snowy ice
The snowy ice spawns in the world and only works as a beautiful block. It can be mined with a silk touch.

![Snowy ice: generation](https://i.postimg.cc/rwp7kbt1/2024-08-11-23-42-36.png)
### Snow bricks: now you can build a beautiful igloo
Snow bricks are crafted from four blocks of snow. Snow bricks can be used to build igloos and anything else you want.

![Snow bricks: igloo](https://i.postimg.cc/Mpctt8QF/Base-Profile-2024-08-11-23-47-38-05.gif)

### Ice bricks/tiles: build an ice castle

![Ice bricks: small igloo](https://i.postimg.cc/B6JTWWjs/2024-08-11-23-44-40.png)

### End Stone - Experience Ore
This ore can be found in the End. When broken, it gives experience. If the pickaxe is enchanted for fortune, you will get more experience. It is found on the top of the end.

![End Stone Experience Ore](https://i.postimg.cc/3Jz280kt/2024-08-11-23-59-56.png)

# New structure: Castle
### About the Castle
The castle is a large structure with pillagers, vindicators, evokers. There are several rooms in the castle: a library, a witch's office with a cauldron, a meeting room, a stage with a lectern, seats, a prison with a villager.

# And more...
You can see the other blocks in the mod trailer.
